review_title: Soo super fantastic tool for you
author: John W.
pros: Analytics and report feature is perfect highlighting all activities that we track.
cons: The only limitation of this tool is the cost only, it is abit expensive

review_title: AD Forensic system
description: Some initial configuration is required, pretty to follow and understand its functionality
author: Dat V.
pros: Easy to access, well defined menu system. Decent dashboard to drill down.
cons: Some minor after setup configuration on Active directory is required. The install wizard could be better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Could be a great product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It has a lot of features and can give a lot of auditing data. It's also fairly cheap and gives amazing reports.
cons: Hard to setup Annual fees Requires a lot of resources to run (setup separate VM) Not great support

review_title: Enhanced visibility into user activities and file access​
author: Lucia S.
pros: IADAudit Plus was very helpful at tracking user logon activity across our network as well as file access. By monitoring these events, we have already been tracking down some unusual patterns which may mean security threat, so we can act accordingly before it does any harm.​
cons: One of the limitations was that native support for auditing non Windows file servers was not available. To have such intelligent coverage level of monitoring we had to implement extra tools which also lead further complexity.

review_title: AD monitoring has enabled comprehensive security oversight​
author: Nermin M.
pros: With ADAudit Plus I can audit Active Directory changes deeply and get real-time alerts about the changes made to the user accounts or group membership, or any GPOs. Having this immediate visibility into these important changes has been a key factor in helping ensure we maintain a chronic level of security in our organization.
cons: The integration was rather easy except that it required additional configuration for some third party SIEM solutions. This created more complexity during the first setup phase and we needed to further collaborate with our security team to let data flow without a hitch.​

review_title: ManageEngine ADAudit Plus Review
description: ManageEngine ADAudit Plus it is a very easy product to use and will make your life easier the more you utlie it, I had to run reports of users who had Bad logins/risky logins and it made it a breeze for me to review them
author: Donald S.
pros: What I liked most about ManageEngine ADAudit Plus is that I could pull reports of risky logins and see who logged in from where when I needed to review a Risky login report.
cons: The only feature I do not like much about ADAudit Plus is the fact that in my eyes alot fo the funcatlity can be done in a normal Azure dashboard.

review_title: More efficient compliance reporting on the regulatory standards
author: Adiel O.
pros: ADAudit Plus has eliminated the need for the development of compliance reports since they offer templates based on different categories of compliance that include SOX, HIPAA, and GDPR. This feature has made it easier to prepare for compliance audits since it has been time-saving and effortless.​
cons: The problem with little customizability was that formatting had to be done through exporting the data and modifying it.

review_title: Very useful for auditing permissions and changes in AD
description: The product is easy to work with and their support team are very helpful. The menus are self explanatory and easy to navigate.
author: Pete E.
pros: This product has a lot of features for an AD admin, with 100s reports and the ability to create custom reports.
cons: I'd like an immediate report of changes to Ad admin, but it seems to come at the same time each day regardless of any changes happening.

review_title: Great add to AD360
description: Great toolset and a no-brainer to include in the AD360 platform. Would benefit from performance optimizations and AI integration.
author: Nick G.
pros: Easy integration into AD360 platform. Robust report building tool. Dashboard has a good about of customization options.
cons: Performance could be improved. The GUI to build custom reports could be more streamlined. Perhaps include AI tools to auto build reports based on prompts.

review_title: Good product
author: Eric S.
pros: Provides a lot of useful tools for helping manage an active directory environment. Set up was easy and functions were easy to find.
cons: I don't really have anything negative to say about the platform. I wish pricing was a little more transparent on the websites though.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: ADAP: La elección perfecta para la auditoría y monitoreo de actividades en la auditoria y monitoreo
description: Mi experiencia general con ADAudit Plus ha sido sumamente positiva. Esta solución ha demostrado ser confiable y eficiente para monitorear y auditar las actividades de nuestra red. Las funciones impactantes y la facilidad de uso del producto nos han sorprendido gratamente. Además, la integración con nuestro sistema existente ha sido muy sencilla. Estamos muy satisfechos con ADAudit Plus y lo recomendaría a cualquier organización que busque una solución completa y confiable para el monitoreo de auditorías.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: ADAudit Plus ha sido una solución increíble para nuestra organización. Sus funciones impactantes nos han permitido tener un control total sobre las actividades de auditoría en nuestra red. Además, es extremadamente fácil de utilizar, incluso para aquellos sin experiencia técnica. Nos ha impresionado lo sencilla que ha sido la integración con nuestro sistema existente. ¡Recomendaría ADAudit Plus a cualquier empresa que busque una solución completa y de fácil implementación para el monitoreo de auditorías!
cons: Lamentablemente, una de las aspectos negativos que encontré con ADAudit Plus fue la falta de personalización en ciertas funciones. Me hubiera gustado tener más opciones para adaptar algunas características a nuestras necesidades específicas. Aunque en general, ADAudit Plus es una solución sólida, este aspecto podría ser mejorado en futuras actualizaciones para brindar una experiencia aún más personalizada

review_title: Very good but need more logs
description: We like it but we would like to have more logs
author: Antonio D.
pros: I like ManageEngine because we can have the logs from the AD
cons: We don't receive every log we need to have a complet use case

review_title: New to AD plus like what I see so far
author: Guy K.
pros: I’ve been using Ad audit for about six months. It’s a solid tool with a user friendly GUI and impressive live auditing, especially when it comes to file activity and monitoring. The dashboard makes it easy to drill down into events, improving visibility.
cons: Setup was a bit tricky some manual config in Active Directory was needed for full integration. Updating the tool was a bit tricky as well.

review_title: A great help for getting information when being audited
description: Positive was able to get information I needed for internal audits easily.
author: Daniel T.
pros: After installing the probe it took no time at all for the data to be ready to audit
cons: Sometime the reports didn't give you the exact data you wanted.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: ADAudit audit's EVERYTHING.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: AD Auditing is only a necessity for regulatory requirements and when you need it the most. However, AD Audit also provides intuitive reporting functionality for those times you can't easily give a quick answer, AD Audit is there for you.
cons: Some of the upgrades are a bit of a pain due to services, and it's hard to install multiple products on the same server due to port usage and service installations.

review_title: Gone are the days of endless lockouts.
description: We use this for tracking bad password attempts and keeping logs of group changes.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like how clear and easy to use the UI is, my biggest qualm with active directory is it seems like most of the fields are intersparsed in random places and it doesn't always give you a full picture of whats going on. With AD audit plus you are able to get clear concise information.
cons: Sometimes the web UI glitches out, but this may be due to our implementation and not necessarily the software.
author_profession: Service Desk Analyst/ On Site Technician

review_title: Very good for compliance
description: We had many cases with different departments who remove files or folder, who made changes in excel file. The software always gives the right answer, never disappointed me. If you are looking for a file server audit, you should just buy it.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: File server auditing is the best so far, very easy to use. UI is well designed. Ad reporting is really helping us to find out who has an old session and locked account
cons: AD audit tool can be improved as far as event log wise. you have to run the software as service, don't forget that, The pricing is a little bit higher.

review_title: Great product for security reports
description: Good insight into file and account history.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Fast, many predefined reports. Easy to set up, updates are comming quite often, fixing bugs and adding new functionality. Very good support.
cons: The price is too high, we were using logging only for 2 domain controllers and 2 file servers, but that was too expensive in comparision to functionality.

review_title: ADAP
author: Jayesh P.
pros: Easy to add nodes as well as report generating. good GUI which make it much easier to access console and mange it.
cons: Co-relation part of custom report generating is bit confusing for me but support team can help in same as well.

review_title: Really Useful
description: Overall experience is great as it allows me to determine what changes were made in the domain and by who at any time.
author: Renesh G.
pros: The ability to track everything that’s going on in my domain and who actually made changes in the domain.
cons: There is a lot of options and sometimes it’s hard to find what you need if never used before.

review_title: Life Saver if you have a complex file server
description: We have a very complex file server where alot of file movement happenes every minute. and wihout it made the tracking of a file very difficult.
author: Mohsin M.
pros: the simplicity and detailed file audit. we now have a fully audited file system, who access a file and when.
cons: it takes a bit of getting used to but once the basics out the way, the software works a treat

review_title: Just new to it, however it is designed effectively and one can understand it in short time.
description: i was able to generate many reports like, Most access files, most modified files, Most access by process , Most access bu users, files accessed after the days mentioned one wanted and modified. moreover we can do file analysis like old files, Stale files, Unmodified files, Large files, Hidden files, etc.
author: Arif E.
pros: Creating alerts as per ones requirement is the best feature like ransomware, of this app, one can get information on any change that is made in files or folders. able to check the files that aren't used since long and many more beautiful features one can achieve if configure effectively based on ones company requirement.
cons: Forums not available , could be it is new in the market. well hope down the line the user would increase and a forum will be created that would help to get the solution and troubleshoot when and then needed.

review_title: AD Audit is very affordable way to get insight into both AD activities and File server activities
author: Ryan S.
pros: Affordable and easy to use. It gathers a ton of useful information for internal audit support for SOX.
cons: Breaks often, you need to keep an eye on it that it does not stop running if your relying on the data.

review_title: AD Audit reports at our finger tips!
author: David S.
pros: We are now able to access very granular reports on all aspects of Active Directory auditing. Prior methodology, before AD Audit Plus was very laborious.
cons: We would like to have application high-availability where the AD Audit Plus service fails on a primary server, then the service automatically starts on a standby server.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Experiência geral com o ManageEngine ADAudit Plus
description: Minha experiência com o ManageEngine ADAudit Plus foi, em geral, positiva. A ferramenta realmente cumpre o que promete quando o assunto é monitoramento de Active Directory, servidores e arquivos, trazendo relatórios prontos, alertas em tempo real e recursos de análise de comportamento que ajudam bastante a identificar atividades suspeitas. Para quem precisa de visibilidade e conformidade, o sistema entrega muito valor, inclusive com relatórios úteis em auditorias
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: a ferramenta oferece monitoramento e relatórios extensos, com visibilidade ampla sobre alterações no Active Directory e servidores de arquivos
cons: A configuração para cenários com alta disponibilidade ou distribuição entre servidores costuma dar bastante trabalho:
